title: pulmonaria alpigena
intro: Pulmonaria alpigena, also known as Lungwort, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Pulmonaria alpigena is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, contributing to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Pulmonaria alpigena can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
